Dialog.name: MSG_002_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 106 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}"Welcome! I'll be taking care of you today!"[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 106 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}"Are you ready to order, or do you need a little more time?"[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 106 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Hmm, it's too bad the school festival got canceled...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 106 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I already went to all the trouble of putting this on, so maybe I should wear it around the dorm for the day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 106 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}"'Sup, Yuka-tan? Hey, does that mean you gotta call me Master?"[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 106 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}"What's going on, Takeba? You planning to work at Mitsuru's mansion or something?"[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 106 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I've been meaning to return this, but now that I look at it, it's a real uniform, huh? It's not just a costume.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 106 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Oh, I should take a picture before I give this back to Senpai.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 106 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I know! I'll drag Fuuka down with me! At least then I won't be alone in the embarrassment...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 106 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}I've got a couple spares, if you wanna try one on. How about it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 106 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}It's a little tricky to put on, so it'll be faster if I help.[n]{f 1 1}
